title: ocotea umbrosa
intro: Ocotea umbrosa, also known as Clusia umbrosa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
